problem id: 9460a623
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND SHL(4)

examples:
  10100001 -> 00000000
  10011111 -> 11110000
  01001111 -> 01110000
  01101011 -> 00010000
  00101101 -> 01000000
  11001001 -> 00000000
  00110111 -> 00110000
  11001011 -> 00010000
  11010110 -> 00100000
  11001100 -> 01000000

query: 01110101
predicted answer: 00000000
